items.title: Internet Underground Issue 8
notes: First modern reader table of contents.
Raw issue page remains the source of truth for original navigation.

items.title: Crash Test Dummies
items.summary: A restored Issue 8 feature on 1990s beta software culture and the way Internet distribution changed release quality.
items.releaseNote: Restored Crash Test Dummies from Internet Underground Issue 8 with a mobile-first reader page and raw-source link.

items.title: The Art (and Science) of Dying Well
items.summary: A restored Issue 8 feature on how early web communities used memorial pages, grief forums, and digital archives to process death online.
items.releaseNote: Restored The Art (and Science) of Dying Well from Internet Underground Issue 8 with a mobile-first reader page and raw-source link.

items.title: Invasion of the Internet Impostors
items.dek: When programs pretend to be people
items.summary: A restored Issue 8 feature on ELIZA, Turing tests, Markov-chain personas, and early fears that online programs could pass as people.
items.releaseNote: Restored Invasion of the Internet Impostors from Internet Underground Issue 8 with a mobile-first reader page and raw-source link.
